reviews.title: Beautiful cedar fence
reviews.body: Taylor and Lanie built us the most beautiful cedar fence. They were professional, clean, and the quality is outstanding. Our backyard feels complete now.

ownerResponse.author: Taylor
ownerResponse.body: Thank you, Sarah! We loved working on your fence project. The cedar really warms up the space, and we're so glad you're happy with how it turned out.

reviews.title: Deck transformation exceeded expectations
reviews.body: Our old deck was falling apart. Happy Place Carpentry completely transformed it into a beautiful outdoor living space. They finished on time and the craftsmanship is exceptional.

ownerResponse.author: Lanie
ownerResponse.body: James, thank you for trusting us with your deck! It was rewarding to see the transformation from start to finish. Enjoy many years of outdoor gatherings!

reviews.title: Kitchen remodel was stress-free
reviews.body: We were nervous about a kitchen remodel, but Taylor and Lanie made it completely stress-free. They communicated clearly, stayed on budget, and the result is better than we imagined.

ownerResponse.author: Taylor
ownerResponse.body: Emily, we're so glad we could make your kitchen remodel a positive experience! Your new kitchen is beautiful, and we appreciate you letting us be part of your home transformation.

reviews.title: Bathroom renovation done right
reviews.body: Professional work from start to finish. They paid attention to every detail and our bathroom looks brand new. Highly recommend Happy Place Carpentry.

ownerResponse.author: Lanie
ownerResponse.body: Thank you, Michael! We take pride in the details, and we're thrilled with how your bathroom turned out. Enjoy your new space!

reviews.title: Expert trim work
reviews.body: The trim work throughout our home is flawless. Taylor and Lanie have an eye for detail that's hard to find. Our home feels so much more polished.

ownerResponse.author: Taylor
ownerResponse.body: Lisa, thank you! Trim work is one of our specialties, and we're glad we could help your home feel more polished. It was a pleasure working with you.

reviews.title: Pergola created perfect outdoor space
reviews.body: We wanted an outdoor living space and Happy Place Carpentry delivered. The pergola is beautiful and well-built. We spend so much more time outside now.

ownerResponse.author: Lanie
ownerResponse.body: David, we're so happy your pergola has created the perfect outdoor space for you! It was a joy to build, and we hope you enjoy it for years to come.
